ICP Configuration
REGISTERED AGENTS
PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE
Agentic AI Platform — System Design
UI LAYER
React Dashboard ICP Configurator HITL Approval Panel Live Activity Feed (SSE) Domain Switcher
↕
PLANNER AGENT (LangGraph)
Dynamic DAG Orchestration · HITL Checkpoint · Conditional Routing · Resume on Approval
↕
SPECIALIZED AGENTS (Plugin Registry)
📡 Trigger Monitor 🎯 ICP Matcher 🔍 Enrichment 👤 Persona Finder 📧 Contact Enrichment 📝 Summary
↕
TOOL LAYER (Mock / Real toggle via .env)
Serper Web Search Apollo Company Data Hunter.io Contacts Proxycurl LinkedIn ICP Scoring Engine
↕
MEMORY & STORAGE
SQLite / PostgreSQL (leads, contacts, runs) ChromaDB Vector Store (dedup) Redis / In-Memory (working state)
Key Design Decisions
Plugin Registry Pattern
New agents self-register with @register decorator. Zero changes to planner or core code required.
Mock/Real Toggle
Every tool falls back to realistic mock data when API keys are absent. One .env change switches to production.
HITL Suspension
Pipeline pauses after contact enrichment. State persisted. Resumes only on explicit human approval via API.
SSE Streaming
Real-time agent progress pushed to UI via Server-Sent Events. No polling. No websocket complexity.
